name: Gewirtz Graph
description: SRG(56, 10, 0, 2) — The unique strongly regular graph on 56 vertices. 10-regular, lambda=0 (no two adjacent vertices share a neighbor), mu=2 (non-adjacent vertices share exactly 2 neighbors). Named after Allan Gewirtz (1969). This graph is triangle-free (lambda=0).
notes: Unique up to isomorphism. Also known as the Sims-Gewirtz graph. Can be constructed from the Steiner system S(3,6,22).
